betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Mhhh. Here is an interesting development.
After so much time mastering magic, after becoming one with recursion, it is only now, after metaphorically running away from it, that I am able to isolate recursion in its purest form.
If a being is in charge of Kashan, they surely seem to have a sense of humor. One that is overflowing with sarcasm.
If you are listening, I appreciate it.
In a weird way, finding the irony in my life, is helping me coming to terms with it.
I sought to be a liberator of people, and yet my actions, albeit indirectly, caused the end of my own people.
I wanted to be a hero, one who would elevate others, and yet now I am to be a punisher of sinners.
I realize who I am, and I can laugh, bitterly, at it.
Well, this is progress, at least I am feeling something.
This is a sign of humanity. Not the best of humanity, but humanity nevertheless, and I am thankful for that.
